_comment: contractSets: weETH LayerZero OFT deployments + canonical minter proxy, previously hardcoded in EtherFiOftBridgeInClassifier. Consumed network-agnostically: an inbound external transfer is reclassified BRIDGE_IN when the token contract is in weethOftTokens AND the sender is in minterProxies. weETH OFT deployments by network: 0x1bf74c=Linea, 0x04c0599=Base+BNB, 0x01f0a316=Scroll, 0x5a7facb9=Optimism, 0xc1fa6e2e=zkSync, 0xa3d68b74=Avalanche+Sonic+HyperEVM+Plasma, 0x7dcc39b4=Berachain+Unichain+Morph, 0xa6cb9889=Swell.
